data.title: JINS HOLDINGS Announces Executive Leadership Changes
data.description:
JINS HOLDINGS (JP:3046) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

JINS HOLDINGS Inc. has announced a series of executive officer changes, effective December 1, 2024. Key changes include Ryo Tanaka’s promotion to Executive Vice President and COO, while Yasuhiro Hayashi steps up as Managing Executive Officer and Global Sales General Manager. These strategic appointments reflect the company’s focus on enhancing its global operations and sales management.

data.title: Amcor PLC Reports Growth in CDI Issuance
data.description:

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

Amcor PLC has announced an increase in its Chess Depository Interests (CDIs) from 600,190,738 to 604,000,155 as of November 2024, reflecting net transfers between CDIs and ordinary shares listed on the New York Stock Exchange. This uptick in CDI issuance highlights ongoing adjustments in Amcor’s securities strategy, which may interest investors tracking the company’s market activities.

data.title: ispace and ONDO Space to Collaborate on Lunar Exploration
data.description:
ispace,inc. (JP:9348) has released an update.

Don't Miss our Black Friday Offers:

  • Unlock your investing potential with TipRanks Premium - Now At 40% OFF!
  • Make smarter investments with weekly expert stock picks from the Smart Investor Newsletter

ispace, inc. and ONDO Space LLC have signed a memorandum of understanding to collaborate on a future lunar program in Mongolia. This partnership aims to enhance space exploration capabilities by combining ispace’s experience with ONDO’s expertise in satellite technology. The collaboration is set to advance lunar missions while fostering a unique Mongolian impact on space exploration.
